supportStatus.exact_supported_structured: Exact value and unit are present in a structured source field.
supportStatus.exact_supported_unstructured: Exact value is present in a source narrative and was parsed with the strict narrative grammar.
supportStatus.supported_after_unit_normalization: Value is exact after a semantics-preserving unit normalization.
supportStatus.supported_after_primary_source_unit_corr: Value is supported after correcting a dataset unit against the authoritative scientific output while preserving the raw encoding.
supportStatus.supported_but_source_encoding_anomalous: Value is supported, but the source bound field is not the expected HBGV encoding.
supportStatus.conflicting_values: Cross-sheet candidates exist but none supports the curated assertion.
supportStatus.not_found_after_cross_sheet_search: No matching candidate was found across both reviewed sheets.
supportStatus.original_output_overrides_dataset: The original scientific output was adjudicated as authoritative over a dataset difference.

temporalStatus.currentness_uncertain: Currentness cannot be resolved from the dataset alone.
